quotes.quote: The growth curves are smoothed, after which biologically significant parameters are extracted and statistically analysed to determine whether the original hypotheses have been confirmed or refuted. Scientific knowledge gained from this process is used to update the model of yeast metabolism.
quotes.rationale: Statistical analysis of physical growth-curve measurements judges hypothesis confirmation and its output is routed into an update of the domain model.

quotes.quote: This is a system which uses techniques from artificial intelligence to automate all aspects of the scientific discovery process: it generates hypotheses from a computer model of the domain, designs experiments to test these hypotheses, runs the physical experiments using robotic systems, analyses and interprets the resulting data, and repeats the cycle.
quotes.rationale: Places the analysis/interpretation step inside an implemented closed cycle over physical robotic experiments.

quotes.quote: Adam conceived 20 hypotheses concerning the identity of genes encoding 13 locally orphan enzymes in S. cerevisiae. Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system and was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24].
quotes.rationale: Reported outcome-level assessment of hypothesis correctness on the robotic system; the packet reports the result but no downstream control consequence.

quotes.quote: Adam has already proven itself by discovering new knowledge [24], whilst Eve is still under development.
quotes.rationale: The confirmation result is presented as the system's own demonstration of discovery, i.e. self-evaluation rather than independent assessment.

quotes.quote: Finally, there is a comprehensive custom-made relational database that stores all the data and meta-data generated throughout the various stages (MySQL).
quotes.rationale: A retention mechanism admitting all stage data and metadata into persistent memory; the packet reports storage but no evaluative gating.

policy_type: automated closed hypothesis-experiment-analysis cycle over a computer model of the domain
memory_structure: computer model of yeast metabolism updated from confirmed/refuted hypotheses
custom-made MySQL relational database of all data and metadata across stages

diagnostics.statement: The packet reports that 12 of 20 conceived hypotheses were confirmed, leaving 8 unconfirmed, and reports no analysis of why the evaluator or generator failed on those.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system and was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24].

diagnostics.consequence: The confirmation rate cannot be attributed between hypothesis-generation quality and validator sensitivity, so the demonstrated discovery claim rests on an uncharacterised error profile.

diagnostics.statement: No reliability study of any kind is reported for the statistical confirmation channel; 'high degree of confidence' is asserted without a reported calibration or agreement design.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: biologically significant parameters are extracted and statistically analysed to determine whether the original hypotheses have been confirmed or refuted
was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24]

diagnostics.consequence: Reliability of the confirmation verdicts must be coded not_evaluated, and confidence statements cannot be treated as probabilistic calibration.

diagnostics.statement: The packet reports no novelty or prior-art assessment gating the hypotheses that Adam conceives from its domain model.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: it generates hypotheses from a computer model of the domain, designs experiments to test these hypotheses
Adam conceived 20 hypotheses concerning the identity of genes encoding 13 locally orphan enzymes in S. cerevisiae.

diagnostics.consequence: Claims of 'new knowledge' are unsupported by any reported check against existing literature within this source.

diagnostics.statement: Validation results are reported only within the system itself; no independent or external replication of the confirmed hypotheses is reported.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam has already proven itself by discovering new knowledge [24], whilst Eve is still under development.
Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system

diagnostics.consequence: External independence is internal self-evaluation, limiting the evidential weight of the discovery claim.

diagnostics.statement: The scope of human involvement is stated only for consumables supply, leaving validator, memory and policy authority unreported and the automation boundary partly ambiguous.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam is intended to be fully automated, with human intervention required only to supply library strain stocks and consumables.

diagnostics.consequence: The phrase 'is intended to be' supports multiple readings of realised versus aspirational autonomy, so human authority over validation cannot be resolved from this packet.

diagnostics.statement: The authors report the systems are not currently cost-effective relative to human scientists.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: we would not currently consider them to be 'cost-effective' in comparison to human scientists.

diagnostics.consequence: Deployment scaling of this validation architecture is constrained by capital, training and maintenance costs regardless of validator quality.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24]

success_check.observable: Reported false-positive and false-negative rates of the statistical confirmation step against independently determined gene-enzyme assignments.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Error rates estimated on a labelled control set of known assignments, reported with intervals rather than a qualitative confidence claim.
success_check.evidence_needed: A systematic error/bias study of the confirmation analysis on positive and negative controls.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: it generates hypotheses from a computer model of the domain, designs experiments to test these hypotheses

success_check.observable: A documented prior-art screen applied to each conceived hypothesis before experiment scheduling.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every hypothesis carries a recorded literature/database match result prior to robotic execution.
success_check.evidence_needed: Prior-art corpus query logs linked to hypothesis identifiers.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam has already proven itself by discovering new knowledge [24], whilst Eve is still under development.

success_check.observable: Independent laboratory re-test of the confirmed gene-enzyme hypotheses.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Agreement with the system's confirmations reported for the full confirmed set, not a selected subset.
success_check.evidence_needed: Replication results from a laboratory not operating the system.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam is intended to be fully automated, with human intervention required only to supply library strain stocks and consumables.

success_check.observable: Explicit statement of which human roles, if any, touch hypothesis selection, confirmation verdicts, model updates and cycle continuation.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Each of generator, executor, validator, memory and policy assigned an observable human role in the source.
success_check.evidence_needed: Documentation or execution traces of a complete unattended cycle.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Scientific knowledge gained from this process is used to update the model of yeast metabolism.
There is a substantial cost for these systems, not only in initial capital outlay and user training, but also in ongoing servicing and maintenance costs

success_check.observable: Externally assessed accuracy of model updates admitted to memory, alongside a cost-per-validated-finding comparison.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Independent assessment covers the model updates actually admitted, with a stated human-scientist baseline.
success_check.evidence_needed: External audit of admitted model revisions plus reported per-finding cost data.
